fields.description: Sum of daily evaporation pan readings for the week
fields.label: Weekly ET Pan (mm)

fields.description: Sum of daily ET Pan for the week — total crop water demand before avocado coefficient
fields.label: Cumulative Weekly ET Crop (mm)

fields.description: Stage multiplier: 0.5=Stress, 0.75=Maintenance, 1.0=Flowering
fields.label: ET Crop Coefficient

fields.description: Cumulative ET Crop x 0.65 — actual water requirement (avocado utilises 65% of evaporation)
fields.label: Clean ET Crop (mm)

fields.description: Tree water need this week minus this week's rainfall. Excludes any carryover from previous weeks
fields.label: This Week Deficit (mm)

fields.description: mm of water depth represented by one cup added to / removed from the evaporation pan.
fields.label: Depth per Cup (mm)

fields.description: Daily ET Crop = ET Pan x this value.
fields.label: Pan-to-Crop Coefficient (daily)

fields.description: Default value used on new Irrigation Planners. Avocado uses ~65% of water that the reference equation suggests.
fields.label: Default Avocado Utilisation Coefficient

fields.description: Effective Temp = Average Temp - this.
fields.label: Avocado Base Temperature (C)

fields.description: If ticked, cumulative_temperature restarts at 0 each calendar year.
fields.label: Cumulative Temperature Resets Yearly

fields.description: If on, SWD resets to initial_swd_mm on Jan 1 each year. Independent of the GDD reset above.
fields.label: SWD Resets Yearly

fields.description: Starting Soil Water Deficit when no previous Weather Reading exists for the year.
fields.label: Initial SWD (mm)

fields.description: If ticked, SWD is never allowed to go positive.
fields.label: Cap SWD at Zero

fields.description: Above this many weekly irrigation hours, the system auto-suggests splitting into multiple cycles.
fields.label: Auto-Cycle Threshold (Hrs/Week)

fields.description: Used when Hrs/Week is greater than 0 but less than the threshold.
fields.label: Cycles When Below Threshold

fields.description: Who last formally reviewed these settings.
fields.label: Last Reviewed By

fields.description: Notes on the most recent review.
fields.label: Review Notes

fields.description: Idempotent re-runs
fields.label: Skip Existing Planners

fields.description: If one shift errors, save the rest
fields.label: Commit on Partial Failure

fields.label: Last Modified By
